issues: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image object string representation instead of a real image path or URL

image_dependency: Question only gives labeled segments (UJ, VJ, ZT, JT) without any textual relationship, so the geometry diagram is needed to interpret how they connect.
multi_step: The prompt provides three quantities (UJ=9, VJ=3, ZT=18) and asks for a different segment (JT), suggesting at least one figure-based relation plus a numerical derivation.
This is a Geometry3K item with an image asset present, which is consistent with multimodal geometric reasoning rather than direct text lookup.
Conservative score because the exact number of reasoning steps cannot be confirmed from text alone.
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single value: 6
A single numeric geometry result is usually easy to check once the diagram relations are known.

risk_flags: Question is underspecified without the image, so evaluation depends on image availability and correct diagram parsing.
